_comment: Build 271 fixture. Fake/sanitized Vapi End Of Call Report (PSTN) representing a clean Vapi-managed number whose destination IS mapped to a demo/pilot roofer's roofers.twilio_number for first-roofer-test-wiring readiness. The mapping lives in the roofer row, not in this payload; destination +1555-0188 is a reserved fictional number standing in for the mapped clean Vapi number. Reserved fictional 555-01xx numbers only; no real PII, no real clean Vapi number. Appointment booked so full final-report processing (lead + booking + call) is exercised.

message.transcript: AI: Thanks for calling, roofing services. Homeowner: My roof started leaking after the storm last night. AI: I'm sorry to hear that — I can book a free inspection for tomorrow afternoon. Homeowner: Yes, please book it.
message.summary: Homeowner reported storm-related roof damage with an active leak and accepted a next-day inspection appointment.
